generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance BuildingControlActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded actuator within Building Control Systems (BCS) enabling bidirectional interaction with physical building environment. Automatically extracted from BIM models with device configurations (e.g., tenant IDs, device endpoints) for runtime integration."
]

instance LightingControllerActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator component for adaptive lighting systems within BCS, configured via BIM models to receive control signals from the Digital Twin for dynamic lighting adjustments."
]

instance HVACControllerActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator component for HVAC systems enabling energy-efficient operation adjustments based on real-time data from the Digital Twin."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT temperature sensor deployed across building infrastructure capturing real-time environmental conditions. Integrated via Eclipse Hono middleware for bidirectional data exchange."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalConditionData
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT humidity sensor providing real-time moisture level data for building environmental monitoring. Automatically integrated with Ditto middleware for seamless data transmission."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalConditionData
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT occupancy sensor detecting presence within building zones. Data transmitted via standardized middleware protocols for adaptive control logic implementation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyData
]

instance EnergyMonitoringSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor measuring real-time energy consumption metrics across building systems. Automatically extracted from BIM models for comprehensive energy monitoring integration."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionData
]

instance ControlLogicSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor providing feedback on building control system operations for adaptive policy validation. Integrated with reinforcement learning models for continuous optimization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData ControlFeedbackData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Data Transmission
instance EnvironmentalConditionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyMonitoringSensor
]

instance ControlFeedbackData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ControlLogicSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BuildingInformationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM model enriched with device configurations (sensors/actuators metadata) serving as semantic backbone for automated Digital Twin deployment. Validated for semantic consistency and completeness."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler, EclipseHonoMiddleware
]

instance RuntimeDataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MDE-transformed runtime model containing sensor readings, control logic, and operational metadata for deployable configurations. Generated from BIM for middleware integration."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler, UnrealEngineVisualization
]

instance ControlPolicyModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Embedded reinforcement learning policies within BIM for adaptive building systems (e.g., BOREALIS project). Validated using ODTE metric for policy effectiveness."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler
]

instance EnvironmentalConditionDataStorage : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed environmental data (temperature, humidity) stored for real-time monitoring and historical analysis. Derived from EnvironmentalConditionData transmission."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalConditionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationService, AnalyticsService
]

instance OccupancyPatternData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated occupancy data for space utilization analysis and adaptive control optimization. Generated from OccupancyData transmission streams."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationService, DecisionSupportService
]

instance EnergyPerformanceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time energy consumption metrics processed for performance monitoring and optimization recommendations. Derived from EnergyConsumptionData transmission."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyConsumptionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo OptimizationService, AlertingService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering framework automating extraction of semantics from BIM models and generating runtime interfaces via model-to-model and model-to-text transformations."
    DTDFVocab:enables RuntimeArtifactGeneration
]

instance EclipseHonoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono middleware enabling real-time data exchange and bidirectional communication between physical sensors/actuators and virtual Digital Twin components."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataIngestionService
]

instance DittoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Ditto middleware providing standardized device management and bidirectional communication protocols for IoT integration within the Digital Twin ecosystem."
    DTDFVocab:enables DeviceConfigurationService
]

instance UnrealEngineVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 platform providing immersive 3D visualization capabilities for interactive Digital Twin monitoring and user interaction."
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance ReinforcementLearningEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning engine implementing adaptive control policies (e.g., BOREALIS project) for building system optimization."
    DTDFVocab:enables PolicyOptimizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service visualizing building operations through sensor data (occupancy, energy usage) with low-latency updates."
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalMetricsInsight, AnomalyDetectionAction
]

instance SimulationAndOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service optimizing control policies (adaptive lighting, HVAC) using reinforcement learning models and BIM-based building representations."
    DTDFVocab:provides PolicyRecommendationInsight, ControlAdjustmentAction
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization service enabling immersive monitoring and user interaction with Digital Twin representations through Unreal Engine."
    DTDFVocab:provides SpatialAnalysisInsight, UserInteractionAction
]

instance CustomizableServiceIntegration : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Modular service integration framework allowing DT engineers to add domain-specific analytics or automation workflows via standardized extension points."
    DTDFVocab:provides ExtensionPointInsight, WorkflowAutomationAction
]

instance RuntimeConfigurationManagement : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous updates service enabling dynamic adjustment of control policies or visualization settings without full redeployment."
    DTDFVocab:provides ConfigurationUpdateInsight, ParameterAdjustmentAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OperationalMetricsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of real-time operational metrics (energy consumption, occupancy patterns) for facility managers and operational decision-making."
]

instance AnomalyDetectionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated detection of operational anomalies (sensor failures, energy spikes) triggering maintenance alerts and corrective actions."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PolicyRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive recommendations for optimizing control policies (adaptive lighting, HVAC adjustments) based on reinforcement learning model outputs."
]

instance ControlAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of building control systems (lighting, HVAC) based on Digital Twin analysis and optimization recommendations."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SpatialAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D spatial analysis of building operations enabling immersive monitoring and interactive exploration through Unreal Engine visualization."
]

instance UserInteractionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "User-driven interactions with Digital Twin representations enabling parameter adjustments and visualization customization."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ExtensionPointInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Information about available extension points for integrating custom analytics or automation workflows within the Digital Twin framework."
]

instance WorkflowAutomationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated execution of domain-specific workflows integrated through modular service extension points."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ConfigurationUpdateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Information about available configuration parameters for dynamic adjustment of Digital Twin services without redeployment."
]

instance ParameterAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of control policies or visualization settings through runtime configuration management."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C18: Environment/Component Structure
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical building infrastructure environment containing all Digital Twin components and their interactions."
    base:contains BuildingControlSystemComponent, LightingSystemComponent, HVACSystemComponent
]

instance BuildingControlSystemComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Central Building Control System integrating all sensors, actuators, and control logic within the Digital Twin framework."
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment
]

instance LightingSystemComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Building lighting system component with adaptive control capabilities enabled through Digital Twin integration."
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment
]

instance HVACSystemComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Heating, Ventilation, and Air Conditioning system component optimized through Digital Twin-based energy efficiency analysis."
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Virtual-to-physical interaction occurs via **control signals and commands** generated by the DT, which are sent back to the physical system through the middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) to actuate changes in the building environment. These interactions include **adjustments to lighting systems, HVAC controls, or other operational parameters** based on real-time analytics, predictive models, or user inputs. The framework supports bidirectional communication by embedding control logic directly into BIM models and automating the deployment of runtime artifacts for seamless execution."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates on **real-time and near-real-time scales**, with synchronization frequencies determined by the operational requirements of the physical system. For example:
   - **Sensor data updates** occur at high frequencies (e.g., milliseconds to seconds) for environmental monitoring.
   - **Control signal execution** is synchronized with the physical system’s operational cadence (e.g., lighting adjustments every few seconds).
   - **Predictive analytics and optimization** may operate on longer time scales (e.g., hourly or daily) for energy consumption forecasting. The framework supports configurable time scales to accommodate diverse use cases, ensuring alignment with the physical system’s dynamics."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented, modular architecture** with the following components:
   - **BIM Backbone**: Central repository for static and runtime data, enriched with device configurations.
   - **Middleware Layer**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto for real-time data ingestion, processing, and actuation.
   - **Visualization Layer**: Unreal Engine 5 for interactive 3D monitoring and user interfaces.
   - **Service Layer**: Customizable extension points for integrating domain-specific services (e.g., energy optimization, predictive maintenance).
   - **Control Layer**: Embedded logic (e.g., reinforcement learning) for adaptive building operations. The constellation supports **scalable deployment** across heterogeneous infrastructure systems while maintaining interoperability through standardized protocols."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans **multiple life-cycle stages** of the physical building, including:
   - **Design phase**: Integration with BIM models for initial device and control logic modeling.
   - **Construction phase**: Deployment of runtime interfaces and middleware configurations.
   - **Operation phase**: Real-time monitoring, adaptive control, and predictive analytics.
   - **Maintenance/Refurbishment phase**: Evolution of the DT to accommodate changes in the physical system (e.g., new sensors, updated control policies). The DT represents the physical asset **as operated**, with continuous synchronization to reflect real-world conditions and operational adjustments."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
   - **Model Validation**: Automated checks for semantic consistency and completeness of BIM models.
   - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) Metric**: Quantifies the alignment between the DT and the physical system, assessing data accuracy and synchronization quality.
   - **Uncertainty Handling**: Runtime data normalization and error correction mechanisms to mitigate sensor noise or communication delays.
   - **Verification and Validation (V&V)**: Iterative testing of control logic and visualization accuracy against real-world operational data. The framework supports **adaptive fidelity** by allowing dynamic adjustments to the DT’s representation based on operational feedback."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs **bidirectional communication protocols** via middleware (Eclipse Hono and Ditto) to connect the physical system and the virtual twin. Key technical details include:
   - **Data Protocols**: MQTT (Message Queuing Telemetry Transport) for lightweight, real-time data exchange between sensors/actuators and the DT.
   - **Network Architecture**: Cloud-based or edge deployment for middleware, with low-latency connections to physical devices.
   - **Endpoint Addressing**: Device metadata (e.g., tenant IDs, endpoints) extracted from BIM models to enable seamless integration.
   - **Security**: Encrypted communication channels to ensure data integrity and confidentiality during transmission. The framework supports **plug-and-play connectivity** for new devices via automated configuration."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted and deployed using a **modular, cloud-edge architecture** with the following components:
   - **Middleware Hosting**: Eclipse Hono and Ditto deployed on cloud or edge servers for real-time data processing.
   - **Visualization Hosting**: Unreal Engine 5 runtime hosted on high-performance servers or local workstations for immersive monitoring.
   - **Deployment Automation**: Model-driven tools generate and deploy runtime artifacts (e.g., middleware configurations, visualization scripts) with minimal manual intervention.
   - **Scalability**: Supports horizontal scaling for large infrastructure systems by distributing DT components across multiple nodes. The framework ensures **low-overhead updates** via runtime configuration management."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT supports **horizontal integration** with external information systems through:
   - **Standardized APIs**: Exposure of DT services via RESTful or MQTT interfaces for interoperability with other systems (e.g., Building Management Systems, IoT platforms).
   - **Data Exchange Protocols**: Compliance with AECO standards (e.g., IFC for BIM interoperability) and IoT protocols (e.g., OPC UA, MQTT) for seamless data sharing.
   - **Modular Services**: Extension points allow integration with third-party analytics, cloud services, or other DTs for collaborative decision-making. The framework ensures **plug-and-play compatibility** with existing AECO tools and systems."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership and privacy are managed through:
   - **Ownership Clarity**: Physical asset owners retain control over operational data, while DT service providers may manage processed analytics or visualization outputs.
   - **Privacy Mechanisms**: Encrypted data transmission and access controls to protect sensitive information (e.g., occupancy patterns, energy usage).
   - **Compliance**: Alignment with AECO regulations and privacy standards (e.g., GDPR for personal data) to ensure ethical data handling. The framework does not specify proprietary data ownership models but emphasizes **transparency** in data usage policies."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following **standards and frameworks**:
   - **BIM Standards**: Industry Foundation Classes (IFC) for semantic consistency in building models.
   - **IoT Protocols**: MQTT (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) for real-time data exchange and OPC UA for industrial interoperability.
   - **Middleware Standards**: Eclipse Ditto for service-oriented DT architectures and BaSyx for industrial IoT compliance.
   - **Model-Driven Engineering (MDE)**: Use of metamodels and domain-specific languages (DSLs) for automated DT deployment.
   - **Visualization Standards**: Unreal Engine 5 for cross-platform 3D visualization compatibility. The framework ensures **interoperability** with AECO-specific tools and IoT ecosystems."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
   - **Data Encryption**: Secure communication channels (e.g., TLS for MQTT) to protect data integrity during transmission.
   - **Access Control**: Role-based permissions (e.g., Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers) to restrict access to sensitive operations.
   - **Fault Tolerance**: Redundant middleware nodes and automated failover mechanisms to prevent system downtime.
   - **Safety Protocols**: Validation of control signals before execution to prevent unintended physical actions (e.g., emergency shutdowns for hazardous conditions). The framework does not support **remote emergency operations** without human oversight, prioritizing safety in critical scenarios."
]
